title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kanpur - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kanpur - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
